items.title: As Dow Hits Record, High-Yield Dogs of the Dow Still a Bargain
items.description: Since the turn of the century, the Dogs of the Dow have significantly outperformed the overall market. These five are perfect plays for a slowing economy.

items.title: Earnings Preview: Amgen (AMGN) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
items.description: Amgen (AMGN) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
